title: Starter Wolf Companion
description: Spawn in with your very own self-healing wolf.
body:
# Starter Wolf Companion

## Overview
Give every new survivor a loyal ally! **Starter Wolf Companion** automatically spawns a tamed wolf for each player the first time they join your world—and again **3 minutes** after their previous companion falls in battle. The wolf slowly regenerates health on its own and keeps the surrounding chunks force-loaded so it’s always ready to protect you.

You are not limited to a single wolf. Though only one is personally spawned, you may tame more you find in the wilderness to raise an army of your own.

## Features
- **One companion per player**  
  - Instantly appears when a player first spawns.  
  - Re-summoned **1:30 minutes** after the last companion’s death.
    - Retains any applied name tag
- **Pre-tamed & obedient** – no bones required.
  - Follows you across dimensions while not sitting
- **Slow self-healing** – recovers health over time without food.
- **Chunk-loading aura** – keeps nearby chunks loaded.
- **Bonus 10 armor points to your companion**

---

*Because every adventure is better with a faithful wolf at your side.*

Works very well with [Greater Wolves](https://modrinth.com/project/aeTDAFU8)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
